caption: Patricia, filed the Mendoza I-130 this morning, confirmation's in the shared drive.
Perfect, thank you. Biometrics notice come through yet?
Not yet, USCIS says 2-3 weeks out. I'll flag it the second it hits.
Ok good. Can you cover my 2pm consult tomorrow? Dentist ran long today.
Yeah, I'll shift Mrs. Okafor to 3. Should be fine on my end.
You're a lifesaver. Bringing donuts Friday as payment lol
Ha, holding you to that. Silver Spring office or Wheaton?
Silver Spring, see you there 🙂
